creator: castilloeduardo@outlook.com.ar
text:
new version with many improvements
and bug fix

https://sourceforge.net/projects/wsjt-z/files/Source/wsjtz-2.5.4-1.22.zip/download

V1.21
- Added option to execute command when custom alert is triggered (Settings->WSJT-Z->Custom alert command line)
- Added option to hold tx frequency in hound mode (Settings->WSJT-Z->No frequency changes for HOUND mode)
- Merged 2.5.4
- Added a button to automatically select a free frequency for TX (based on last few cycles)
- Added an option to automatically select a free frequency for TX after band or mode change (Settings->WSJT-Z->Find free TX freq after auto band change)
- Minor fixes
